title: Document

child_sections.title: vision extraction
child_sections.summary: The "vision extraction" section contains Optical Character Recognition (OCR) text captured from three pages of a document – Pages 1, 2, and 3. This extracted text, generated by a vision model, serves as the raw data for further processing or analysis. Currently, the section only indicates placeholders where this OCR content would be inserted.

summary: Top-level page index over extracted sections
